summary: Tested Calculator v3 Upgrade: packages (Perus/Suositeltu/Premium), auto-triggers, grouped addons, warnings, badges, and updated CTAs. All features working correctly on both desktop and mobile.
passed_tests: API /api/calculator-config returns services with packages array (3 per service)
All services have Perus/Suositeltu/Premium packages
Suositeltu package has default=true with 'Eniten valittu' badge
All services have auto_triggers array with correct structure
All addons have group field (esityot, tarvittaessa, lisapalvelut)
Addons have badge field (Suositeltu, Usein valitaan)
Addons have warning field for soft warnings
Kattomaalaus: selecting 'Vähän sammalta' auto-enables 'Katon pesu' + 'Sammalesto'
Kattomaalaus: 3 packages shown with correct addon_ids
Sisämaalaus: selecting 'Pieniä epätasaisuuksia' auto-enables 'Halkeamien korjaus'
Julkisivumaalaus: selecting 'Paljon hilseilyä' auto-enables 'Vanhan maalin poisto' + 'Halkeamien korjaus'
Mikrosementti: selecting 'Kylpyhuone' auto-enables 'Vedeneristys'
Package selection auto-toggles correct addons (Premium selects all, Perus deselects extras)
Manually toggling addon sets selectedPackage to 'custom'
Deselecting addon with warning shows amber warning text below card
Addons grouped into ESITYÖT, TARVITTAESSA, LISÄPALVELUT sections with labels
Badges 'SUOSITELTU' and 'USEIN VALITAAN' displayed on correct addons
Result page shows selected addons in 'Mihin arvio perustuu' section
CTA button says 'Pyydä tarkka tarjous (maksuton)'
Send photos button says 'Lähetä kuvat nopeaa arviota varten'
Price box shows 'Hinta tarkentuu yleensä ±10 %' text
Mobile: Package selector visible with 'ENITEN VALITTU' badge
Mobile: Grouped addons visible and scrollable
Mobile: Sticky bottom price bar shows price range and kotitalousvähennys
Mobile: Full flow works without errors
seed_data_creation: Calculator config auto-seeded with packages, auto_triggers, and grouped addons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calculator v3 upgrade fully tested. Key features: (1) Each service has 3 packages (Perus/Suositeltu/Premium) with Suositeltu as default. (2) Auto-triggers fire based on user selections (e.g., moss condition enables wash+moss_treatment). (3) Addons grouped into esityot/tarvittaessa/lisapalvelut with badges and warnings. (4) Updated CTAs: 'Pyydä tarkka tarjous (maksuton)' and 'Lähetä kuvat nopeaa arviota varten'. (5) Price box shows '±10%' context. Key data-testids: package-selector, package-{id}, addon-{id}, addons-step, mobile-price-bar. Auto-triggers tracked by autoTriggersApplied state to fire only once.

packages.structure: 3 packages per service: Perus, Suositeltu (default), Premium
packages.addon_ids: Each package has addon_ids array that auto-toggles addons

feature_verification.warnings: Amber text appears when deselecting addon with warning field
